_comment: Drop-in entries for anthropics/claude-plugins-official/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json. Each block is a complete entry — paste it into the JSON array, alphabetized by 'name'. Update 'sha' to the pinned commit on MSApps-Mobile/claude-plugins/main at submission time. Categories below mirror upstream usage (development, productivity, integrations). Adjust if upstream taxonomy changes.

cowork-mem.name: cowork-mem
cowork-mem.description: Persistent memory across Cowork sessions. Automatically recalls past decisions, file changes, insights, and errors so you never lose context between sessions. Inspired by claude-mem, rebuilt natively for Cowork. 7 skills covering recall, planning, exploration, search, knowledge Q&A, and timeline reporting.

notion-memory.name: notion-memory
notion-memory.description: Long-term memory for Claude across sessions via Notion, plus the 4 official Anthropic Notion skills (knowledge-capture, meeting-intelligence, research-documentation, spec-to-implementation) bundled together. MSApps memory skill + Anthropic-authored skills, all attributed.

opsagent-shopify.name: opsagent-shopify
opsagent-shopify.description: Shopify operating toolkit for partners and merchants — Admin API + Storefront MCP tools (products, files, orders, customers, themes, metafields), theme-install playbooks, and Shopify Academy Partner Marketing guidance. Includes a TypeScript SDK with typed contracts.

whatsapp-mcp.name: whatsapp-mcp
whatsapp-mcp.description: Connect Claude to WhatsApp — search messages, read conversations, send texts and media, and manage business outreach. Includes a Notion-backed conversation memory system that learns each contact's tone, language, and preferences over time. Works in any language.
